```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="margin-bottom:0.85em;text-align:left;">
  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;">Skills · slash commands</div>
  <div style="background:#1E1E2E;border-radius:10px;padding:0.5em 0.7em;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.3em;flex-wrap:wrap;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6em;color:#F8F7F0;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);">
   <span style="color:#3DA18A;">›</span>
   <span style="background:rgba(86,84,162,0.3);color:#C4C3E8;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">/commit</span>
   <span style="background:rgba(86,84,162,0.3);color:#C4C3E8;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">/review</span>
   <span style="background:rgba(86,84,162,0.3);color:#C4C3E8;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">/init</span>
   <span style="background:rgba(86,84,162,0.3);color:#C4C3E8;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">/think</span>
   <span style="color:#9B8EA0;font-size:0.85em;margin-left:auto;">.md files</span>
  </div>
 </div>

 <div>
  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;text-align:left;">Hooks · shell on events</div>
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.5em;">

   <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.65em 0.8em;text-align:left;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(212,95,71,0.1);border-top:3px solid #D45F47;">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;margin-bottom:0.25em;">
     <div style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;border-radius:0.35em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FCEEEC,#FAD9D2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#D45F47;"><i data-lucide="check-square" style="width:0.75em;height:0.75em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#D45F47;font-weight:700;">PostToolUse</div>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">Lint after edit</div>
   </div>

   <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.65em 0.8em;text-align:left;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(212,95,71,0.1);border-top:3px solid #D45F47;">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;margin-bottom:0.25em;">
     <div style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;border-radius:0.35em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FCEEEC,#FAD9D2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#D45F47;"><i data-lucide="pencil" style="width:0.75em;height:0.75em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#D45F47;font-weight:700;">PreToolUse</div>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">Format on write</div>
   </div>

   <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.65em 0.8em;text-align:left;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(212,95,71,0.1);border-top:3px solid #D45F47;">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;margin-bottom:0.25em;">
     <div style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;border-radius:0.35em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FCEEEC,#FAD9D2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#D45F47;"><i data-lucide="shield-check" style="width:0.75em;height:0.75em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#D45F47;font-weight:700;">Stop</div>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">Build verify</div>
   </div>

  </div>
 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.85em;text-align:right;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#5654A2;font-style:italic;">
  → Part 2: skill design
 </div>

</div>
```
